chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Misc. application No.D- 08 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections 2. For order on MA No 1781/2017 3. for hearing 29.01.2018. Mr. Rashid Raees Advocate for the applicant. Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari A.P.G -=-=- Learned counsel for the applicant files statement and submits that under the instructions of applicant he does not press this Cr. Misc. application which is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed
